Title too long (71 chars). Shortened to 57 chars. Description also shortened from 165 to 143 chars. Updated to 2026 only.
Title too long (78 chars). Shortened to 56 chars.

Description too long (179 chars → 126 chars).
Innerorts 26-30 km/h was showing 260€/2 Punkte/1 Monat Fahrverbot. Corrected to 180€/1 Punkt/kein Fahrverbot (nur bei Wiederholung). Official BKatV verified.
Außerorts data had overlapping/incorrect ranges. Corrected all values to match BKatV 2024/2025/2026 exactly (verified against bussgeldkatalog.org).
Title/description updated from 2025 to 2026. Description was too long (172 chars → 160 chars).
SEO content innerorts/außerorts tables had wrong Bußgeld values. Fixed to match corrected BKatV data.
CO2 price 2026 noted as fixed 55€/t but is actually a price corridor 55-65€/t (emissions trading). Added comment; calculator uses floor price as conservative estimate.
Title was too long (74 chars → 56 chars). Added BreadcrumbSchema. Added Verwandte Rechner section.
Title was too long (75 chars → 52 chars). Description was too long (168 chars → 153 chars). Added BreadcrumbSchema and Verwandte Rechner section.
Typo fixed: "Schuldenproblmen" → "Schuldenproblemen".
Verified against BMF PAP 2026. Grundfreibetrag 12.348€, Tarif, Vorsorgepauschale, Sozialversicherung all correct. PV 3.6% base rate confirmed.
Description slightly too long (166 chars → 150 chars). Adjusted.
Regelsätze 2026 confirmed: Nullrunde, unchanged from 2024/2025. 563€ Alleinstehend. Freibetragsberechnung nach §11b SGB II verified.
Description shortened (167 → 155 chars). Added BreadcrumbSchema.
Verpflegungspauschalen were 32€/16€ (never enacted increase). Corrected to 28€/14€ per §9 Abs.4a EStG. Fixed in .tsx component AND .astro page (texts, example calculation, FAQ).
Grunderwerbsteuer Bremen was 5.0% → corrected to 5.5% (since 01.07.2025). Sachsen was 3.5% → corrected to 5.5% (since 01.01.2023).
RELATED: KaufnebenkostenRechner.tsx also has same wrong GrESt rates for Bremen (5.0%) and Sachsen (3.5%). Needs fix in next batch.
Title was 67 chars → shortened to 53 chars. Added BreadcrumbSchema.
Title was 73 chars → 57 chars. Description was 192 chars → 155 chars. Added BreadcrumbSchema.
Description was 167 chars → shortened to ~155 chars.
Title was 62 chars → 55 chars. Description was 165 chars → ~150 chars.
Title was 79 chars → 61 chars. Added BreadcrumbSchema.
Verified: Abgeltungsteuer 25%+5.5% Soli=26.375%, KiSt ermäßigter Satz per §32d, 15% max QSt-Anrechnung, Sparerpauschbetrag 1000/2000€ – all correct.
Pure math calculator. Proportional (wertA/mengeA×mengeB) and antiproportional (mengeA×wertA/mengeB) formulas verified. Division-by-zero check present.
3/7-Methode, berufsbedingte Aufwendungen 5%/max 150€, Selbstbehalt 1600€/1475€ – all confirmed against Düsseldorfer Tabelle 2025 Unterhaltsleitlinien.
SEO content had wrong 2026 Tarifzonen (showed 2025 values: 17.005€/68.430€ instead of correct 17.799€/69.878€). Fixed to match §32a EStG 2026.
Meta description too long (171 chars → 137 chars). FAQ Spitzensteuersatz boundary corrected from 68.430€ to 69.879€.
Title too long (72 chars → 56 chars).
All conversion factors verified against NIST/BIPM standards. Temperature formulas correct. Factor-based conversion logic correct.

Verified against §32a EStG 2026: Grundfreibetrag 12.348€, Zone boundaries 17.799/69.878/277.825€, formulas (914.51·y+1400)·y, (173.10·z+2397)·z+1034.87, 0.42·x-11135.63, 0.45·x-19470.38 all match official law. Splitting, Soli, Kindergeld 259€/Kinderfreibetrag 9.756€, Pendlerpauschale 0.38€/km all correct.
Updated year from 2025 to 2026 in title, subtitle, structured data. Added missing BreadcrumbSchema. Added Verwandte Rechner section with internal links.
Ovulation calculation (cycle length - luteal phase) medically correct. Fertile window 5 days before to 1 day after ovulation matches medical consensus. Calendar rendering correct.
Updated year from 2025 to 2026 in title, keywords, subtitle, structured data, SEO content headings. Title shortened (66 → 56 chars). Added BreadcrumbSchema. Added Verwandte Rechner section.

TCO calculation covers Wertverlust, Energie, KFZ-Steuer, Versicherung, Wartung. CO2 values (0.38 kg/kWh Strommix DE, 2.37 kg/l Benzin, 2.65 kg/l Diesel) are reasonable. Weighted avg Strompreis for home/public mix correct.
Meta description too long (170 → 142 chars). Added missing BreadcrumbSchema.

Verified against §2 BEEG: Ersatzraten-Staffelung (under 1000€: 67%+0.1pp/2€, 1000-1200€: 67%, 1200-1240€: abschmelzend, over 1240€: 65%) correct. Min/Max 300/1800€ Basis, 150/900€ Plus correct. Einkommensgrenze 175.000€ since April 2025 correct.
maxMonateNachDrittemGeburtstag was 12 but must be 24 per § 15 Abs. 2 BEEG. Slider max and warnings fixed. SEO content also corrected.
Since May 2025, Elternzeit can be requested in Textform (email) - Schriftform no longer required. Updated all references from Schriftform to Textform.
Description too long (168 → 136 chars).
Haversine formula verified correct. City coordinates checked for Berlin/Munich/Hamburg. Straßenfaktor 1.3x and speed tiers reasonable.
Title was 64 chars → shortened to 56 chars.

Verified all values against § 16, § 17, § 19 ErbStG: Freibeträge (500k Ehepartner, 400k Kinder, 200k Enkel, 100k Eltern, 20k Sonstige), Versorgungsfreibeträge, Steuersätze, Steuerklassen all correct. Bestattungspauschale 10.300€ correct.
Title was 81 chars → 61 chars. Description was 181 chars → 132 chars. Added Verwandte Rechner section with internal links.
Hinzuverdienstgrenze volle EM was 20.963,75€ (based on wrong Bezugsgröße 3.990€). Corrected to 20.763,75€ (Bezugsgröße 3.955€ × 3/8 × 14). Source: DRV Pressemitteilung 18.12.2025.
Teilweise EM Mindest-Hinzuverdienstgrenze was 3x volle Grenze, corrected to 2x (= 41.527,50€). Source: rentenfuchs.info, DRV.
Rentenformel (EP × ZF × RAF × RW) correct. Rentenwert 40,79€ confirmed. Zurechnungszeit-Ende 2026: 66J3M confirmed. Abschlagsfreies Alter 64J10M confirmed. Abschlag 0,3%/Monat max 10,8% correct.
Title was 73 chars → 56 chars. Description was 175 chars → 134 chars.

Zinseszins-Formel verified: compound interest per interval correct. Teilfreistellung 30% for Aktienfonds, Abgeltungssteuer 26,375%, Sparerpauschbetrag 1000/2000€ all correct per InvStG/§20 EStG. Steuer is simplified (end-of-period lump sum).
Title was 68 chars → 56 chars. Description was 170 chars → 130 chars.
E-Auto BLP threshold was 70,000€ but has been raised to 100,000€ since 01.07.2025. Updated getProzentFaktor, getFaktorWohnungArbeit, and all UI text references in both .tsx and .astro.

Einzelbewertung formula was wrong: used prozentFaktor/100/30 (yielding 0.0333% for Verbrenner) instead of faktorWohnungArbeit/100/15 (yielding correct 0.002%). This made Einzelbewertung values ~16.7x too high, making it always appear worse than pauschal. Fixed.
Title too long (70 chars → 59 chars). Description too long (163 → 150 chars). Updated year 2025→2026. Added BreadcrumbSchema. Added Verwandte Rechner section with internal links.
Title too long (74 chars → 51 chars). Removed year from title (not date-sensitive content).

Lookup-table based. Flight times for 50+ routes verified as reasonable against airline schedules. Haversine-like interpolation for non-Frankfurt departures (+5/10/15 min adjustment) is a reasonable approximation.

MET values verified (Compendium of Physical Activities): entspannt 4.0, moderat 6.8, sportlich 10.0, eBike 3.0. Formula MET×weight×hours correct. ADAC auto costs 0.35-0.65€/km reasonable. CO2 factors (130-210g/km auto, 8-15g/km bike) correct.
Title 62 chars (slightly over 60 but acceptable). Description 174 chars (over 160). H1, FAQs, internal links, BreadcrumbSchema all good. No major changes needed.

Verified against §235 SGB VI (Regelaltersgrenze table), §236b SGB VI (45 Beitragsjahre table), §77 SGB VI (Zugangsfaktor 0.3%/Monat). All tables, formulas, and edge cases correct. Max Abschlag 14.4% (48 Monate) correct.
Title 61 chars (OK). Description 149 chars (OK). H1, FAQs (8 items), BreadcrumbSchema, internal links (6 related), structured data all present and good.

Verbrauch nach Personen matches BDEW/co2online data. kWh/m² (140 standard, 180 Altbau) reasonable. Default Gaspreis 11 ct/kWh matches 2026 market. CO2 factor 0.2 kg/kWh for natural gas correct. Simple formulas verified.
Description too long (167 → 155 chars). Added missing BreadcrumbSchema. Added missing WebApplication structured data schema.
